bug_clusters.title: Knowledge endpoints return 403 for SUPER_ADMIN
bug_clusters.impact: Super Admin should bypass permission checks per RBAC hierarchy; missing KNOWLEDGE:VIEW/FLUENCE:VIEW in permission set or controller not invoking SecurityService bypass

bug_clusters.title: Activity feed 500 error on wall
bug_clusters.impact: Wall shows 'Unable to load activity feed. The service may be temporarily unavailable.' fallback

bug_clusters.title: workflow/inbox/count intermittent timeouts and 503s
bug_clusters.impact: Sidebar inbox badge broken; repeated 30s timeouts slow down page hydration
